title: The Overgrown Gates
setting: The humid, vine-choked ruins outside the Tomb. Twilight.
goal: Find the 'Moonstone Key' hidden in the outer ruins, and use it to unlock the heavy stone doors to enter the Tomb.
obstacles: A territorial shadow-panther prowls the ruins. Pit traps are hidden under the leaves. The door mechanism is heavily rusted.

title: The Hall of Whispers
setting: Inside the Tomb. A dark, echoing stone corridor. The floor is covered in crunchy bone debris.
goal: Sneak past the blind Spectral Guardian, retrieve the 'Sun Shield' from the central pedestal, and reach the stairs leading down.
obstacles: The Spectral Guardian is blind but has incredible hearing. Stepping on the bone debris makes loud noises. The room is pitch black.

title: The Flooded Throne
setting: The flooded throne room of the Sunken King. Water is waist-deep.
goal: Use the Sun Shield to deflect the King's magic, steal the 'Golden Crown' from his skeletal head, and escape back up the stairs.
obstacles: The Sunken King awakens and casts necrotic spells. The freezing water slows movement. The exit stairs begin to collapse during the escape.
